title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Jindal Steel & Power - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
